lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: 'ello sail her! I busy now. You come back later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: 'ello sail her! I busy now. You come back later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: 'ello sail her!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: I glamorous weather girl. I get weather numbers to learn how weather work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: An unusual aspiration for a troll.

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: I like weather since I got my name. My first food gave me shiny weather number getter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I help you with collecting weather data?

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: You no good sail her. Windys topple you.

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: You already get me weather number here. Was very tasty!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: You already have number getter. Go find where windys stop!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: You already have another number getter. Go find where windys stop!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: Number getter not for here. Dis one go over there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I help you with collecting weather data?

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: Yer, I like weather number!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: You take my number getter! Find where windy no do the blowing, and it get numbers. Bring numbers back to me! I try myself, but I just follow wind round in circles. Make sure you no do that!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: Numbers so tasty. Weather here must be really good!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Troll scientists really do operate on a higher level don't they?

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: Soon I be smart enough to speak to rocks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: Bye sail her!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: 'ello sail her!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: I have number getter, but is brown and sad.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I actually have something for that!

lines.speaker: Meaty Aura Logist
lines.text: Number getter good now! You take it and find where windy no do the blowing. You get the numbers and bring back to me! I try myself, but I just follow wind round in circles. Make sure you no do that!
